themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And he ordained him priests for the high places, and for the devils, and for the calves which...".
